title: croton cornutus
intro: Croton cornutus, also known as the dog croton or cowtail, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton cornutus include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional African and Asian remedies to treat various ailments.
